/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/alpha_project_app.dir/app/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_app.dir/homescreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/alpha_project_app.dir/settings.cc.o -o alpha_project  libalpha_project_lib.a
